message: fix: tighten quote italics and slide tag parsing

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ installed, auto mode can use local CLI models when `cli.enabled` is set (see `do
 
 - Video and podcast summaries ignore sponsor/ads/promotional segments; do not include them in the summary.
 - Do not mention sponsor/ads or that they were skipped.
-- Include 1-2 short direct quotes (italic, in quotation marks) only when a standout line is present; otherwise omit quotes. Never mention ads/sponsors/boilerplate or that you skipped/ignored them.
+- Include 1-2 short direct quotes (italic, in quotation marks, exactly _"..."_) only when a standout line is present; otherwise omit quotes. Never mention ads/sponsors/boilerplate or that you skipped/ignored them.
 
 ## Z.AI

@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ export function buildFileSummaryPrompt({
     directive.formatting,
     'Format the answer in Markdown.',
     'Use short paragraphs; use bullet lists only when they improve scanability; avoid rigid templates.',
-    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in italics with quotation marks (e.g. _"..."_). Otherwise omit quotes. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
+    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in italics with quotation marks (format exactly as _"..."_). Any quote not italicized is invalid—omit quotes instead. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
     'Do not use emojis.',
     presetLengthLine,
     maxCharactersLine,
@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@ export function buildFileTextSummaryPrompt({
     directive.formatting,
     'Format the answer in Markdown.',
     'Use short paragraphs; use bullet lists only when they improve scanability; avoid rigid templates.',
-    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in italics with quotation marks (e.g. _"..."_). Otherwise omit quotes. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
+    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in italics with quotation marks (format exactly as _"..."_). Any quote not italicized is invalid—omit quotes instead. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
     'Do not use emojis.',
     presetLengthLine,
     maxCharactersLine,
